questions.question: Describe the key components of a learning system and their functions.
keyPoints: Training Data: Provides historical examples for learning
Learning Algorithm: Extracts patterns from data
Performance Element: Makes predictions on new data

questions.question: Explain the complete process of designing a machine learning system, including all major steps from problem definition to deployment.
keyPoints: Problem Definition: Clarify objectives and constraints
Data Preparation: Clean, transform, and engineer features
Algorithm Selection: Choose appropriate learning methods
Model Training: Implement learning process with validation
Performance Evaluation: Assess using appropriate metrics
Monitoring: Track performance and detect drift
